title: WhiteNight PvP
description: Clean and simple 1.8.9 PvP Texturepack in White
body:
WhiteNight PvP is a **_16x_** texturepack for Minecraft **_1.8.9 pvp_**.

_working with 1.6.1 - 1.8.9_

_if you do not like the endstone and/or tool texture get v1.2_

It has a **_clean design_**, **_sound_** and everything you need for pvp!

The Resourcepack adds:
- wool textures
- natural-block textures
- Custom UI _(inventory, hotbar..)_
- new place sounds
- item-textures _(swords, fishing rod, firecharge, bow..)_
- no pumpkin overlay
- block breaking animation
- low fire
- smaller handhelds _(firstperson, 0.5x Scale)_
- tool & sword textures
- **_and much more_**

Try it out yourself!

_~I may remake the endstone texture (added in v1.3)~_
